metadata.title: States PCS: Himachal Pradesh GK for HPPSC Exams

questions.question: Against which raja of Nagarkot, did Muhammad bin Tughlaq send an expedition?
questions.explanation: Muhammad bin Tughlaq sent an expedition against Raja Prithvi Chand of Nagarkot of Kangra and personally undertook the campaign in 1337 A.D

questions.question: Which ruler ascended to the throne of Kangra in 1360, when Firoz Shah Tughlaq was the sultan of Delhi?
questions.explanation: Raj Rup Chand was the ruler of kangra in 1360, when Firoz Shah Tughlaq was ruling Delhi

questions.question: Who translated the books in Jwalamukhi temple into persian?
questions.explanation: Izzudin Khali Khani translated the books in Jwalamukhi temple into persian and the translation was named as Dalail-i-Firozshahi

questions.question: Which of the following rulers had to leave his son as a hostage at Akbar’s court?
questions.explanation: Bidhi Chand, ruler of Kangra, had to leave his son, Tirlok Chand as a hostage in Akbar’s court.

questions.question: Which of the following rulers was appointed as the Thanedar of Bangash by Shahjahan?
questions.explanation: Jagat Singh, the Pathania Chief, was appointed as the Thanedar of Bangash by Shahjahan in 1634 A.D

questions.question: Who was appointed as the governor of Jalandhar Doab by Ahmad Shah?
questions.explanation: In 1758 A.D Raja Ghumand Chand was appointed as the governor of Jalandhar Doab by Ahmad Shah.

questions.question: Who among the following members of State Reorganisation Commission in 1953 was not in favour of merger of Himachal Pradesh with Punjab?
questions.explanation: Justice Fazi Ali, the chairman of the State Reorganisation Commission set up in 1953, was not in favour of merger of Himachal Pradesh with Punjab

questions.question: In which year were the first elections to Vidhan Sabha held in Himachal Pradesh?
questions.explanation: In 1951 first elections to Vidhan Sabha were held in Himachal Pradesh and Dr. Y S Parmar became the first Chief Minister of HP

questions.question: Mandi State Association was established by?
questions.explanation: Swami Purnanand established Mandi State Association which opposed the Begar system and other evils.

questions.question: Where did the All India State people’s conference in 1938 take place?
questions.explanation: The All India State people’s conference was held in 1938 at Ludhiana. It was held to promote the Praja Mandals.
